descriptionZh: Opus 4.7 发布仅 43 天后，Opus 4.8 就来了！
descriptionEn: Only 43 days after the release of Opus 4.7, Opus 4.8 is here! Programming capabilities have surged, dominating all leaderboards. Claude Code unleashes hundreds of agents working in parallel, allowing one person to rewrite 750,000 lines of code in 11 days with a 99.8% test pass rate. Even more formidable, Claude Mythos arrives in a few weeks.

descriptionZh: 【攻略】刚刚，清华团队开源了硬核Agent系统PilotDeck，在开发者社区引起热议。
descriptionEn: [Guide] Just now, the Tsinghua team open-sourced the hardcore Agent system PilotDeck, which has gone viral in the developer community. The project features independent cabins, memory that is visible and editable, and tokens can be saved by more than half. From now on, one person is an entire AI army!

title: 当AI广泛参与股票交易时会发生什么？

descriptionZh: 美国一所大学的一项研究表明，如果多个人工智能参与资产管理，它们最终会倾向于采取相同的行动。
descriptionEn: A study by a U.S. university shows that if multiple AIs are involved in asset management, they will eventually tend to take the same actions.
